persona.name: Alex
persona.description: Technical data engineer building data collection pipelines. Deep understanding of schemas, validation, normalization. Wants precise control over field types and constraints.

initialIntent:
## Purpose
Collect intake information from new fitness coaching clients including their health history, fitness goals, and availability.

## Audience
New clients signing up for personal training or group fitness coaching.

## Exclusions
Do not collect detailed medical records — only relevant health conditions that affect exercise safety.
finalIntent: {"purpose":{"content":"Collect intake information from new fitness coaching clients including their health history, fitness goals, and availability.","updatedAt":"2026-03-24T23:47:51.323Z"},"audience":{"content":"New clients signing up for personal training or group fitness coaching.","updatedAt":"2026-03-24T23:47:51.323Z"},"exclusions":{"content":"Do not collect detailed medical records — only relevant health conditions that affect exercise safety.","updatedAt":"2026-03-24T23:47:51.323Z"},"constraints":{"content":"","updatedAt":"2026-03-24T23:47:51.323Z"}}

opinions.text: Should we include a checkbox for clients to indicate any specific health conditions that may affect their exercise?
Would it be beneficial to categorize fitness goals (e.g., weight loss, muscle gain, improved endurance) for easier analysis?
Should we provide examples or prompts for the 'Nutrition Habits' and 'Sleep Patterns' fields to guide clients in their responses?
Is it necessary to include a field for clients to specify any preferred training styles (e.g., one-on-one, group classes, outdoor sessions)?
Should we add a field for clients to indicate their preferred training frequency (e.g., times per week)?

schemaDescription: 9 fields: Health History, Fitness Goals, Availability, Activity Level, Nutrition Habits, Sleep Patterns, Previous Experience, Commitment Level, Preferred Contact Method
provenanceSummary: Schema generated once. 5 opinion resolutions recorded. 6 total provenance entries.
